# Qualitative Foundations of Project Planning

Author1, Author2, and Author3

<span style="color: red;">ALL CONTENT IN THIS REPORT IS PRELIMINARY AND DRAFT. DO NOT REFERENCE FOR ANY PURPOSE.</span>

Key topics:  

- Building systems context: physical, ecological, social.  
- Design objectives: primary vs. secondary outcomes, performance goals and risk
tolerance.  
- Life cycle targets Defining NbS for engineering applications.
